Samuel Okonkwo
Policy Analyst, New York, NY
samuel.okonkwo@example.com | 555-201-3018 | linkedin.com/in/samuel-okonkwo

SUMMARY
Public policy analyst with 6 years in city government and policy research.
Conducts program evaluation, drafts policy briefs, and advises senior officials
on legislation and regulatory matters affecting housing and transportation.

EXPERIENCE
Policy Analyst — NYC Office of Management & Budget (2020–present)
- Conduct policy analysis and program evaluation on housing and transportation
  initiatives, modeling budget and constituent impact for senior officials.
- Draft policy briefs, testimony, and legislative summaries; brief leadership on
  regulatory and intergovernmental matters.
- Coordinate with agencies and community stakeholders to assess program outcomes
  and recommend reforms.

Research Associate — Urban Policy Institute (2017–2020)
- Researched public-policy issues, authored reports, and analyzed legislation and
  government data to support advocacy and program-evaluation work.

SKILLS
Public policy, policy analysis, program evaluation, legislation, government,
research, policy briefs, regulatory, stakeholders, budget, constituents, public
affairs, advocacy, intergovernmental, testimony

EDUCATION
M.P.P. Public Policy, Princeton SPIA, 2017
B.A. Government, Cornell University, 2014
